title: origanum vulgare subsp. glandulosum
intro: Origanum vulgare subsp. glandulosum, also known as glandular oregano, is a subspecies of the Origanum vulgare plant, which is a perennial herb native to Europe, North Africa, and the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it effective against a range of infections and diseases. The health benefits of Origanum vulgare subsp. glandulosum include its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Origanum vulgare subsp. glandulosum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, essential oils, and capsules, which are used to treat a variety of health conditions.
